case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. PAUL THROWER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-02-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
